languages.text: {n}Звонкий смех Джай заставляет остальных членов свиты вздрогнуть. {/n} "Ну и ашмаги же эти чужаки! Значит, вот как они наказывают тех, кто влез, куда не просят". {n}Отсмеявшись, она поправляет растрепавшиеся волосы.{/n} "Их ждет крупное разочарование. Мы найдем способ сбежать отсюда".

traits.locale_text: {n}Звонкий смех Джай заставляет остальных членов свиты вздрогнуть. {/n} "Ну и ашмаги же эти чужаки! Значит, вот как они наказывают тех, кто влез, куда не просят". {n}Отсмеявшись, она поправляет растрепавшиеся волосы.{/n} "Их ждет крупное разочарование. Мы найдем способ сбежать отсюда".
traits.speaker: JaeCompanion

languages.text: {n}Jae's ringing laugh startles the rest of the retinue.{/n} "These xenos are right ashmags, aren't they? So, this is how they punish those who stick their noses where they don't belong!" {n}Once she is done laughing, she brushes her dishevelled hair.{/n} "They are in for a great disappointment. We will find a way to escape this place."
languages.original_text: {n}Звонкий смех Джай заставляет остальных членов свиты вздрогнуть. {/n} "Ну и ашмаги же эти чужаки! Значит, вот как они наказывают тех, кто влез, куда не просят". {n}Отсмеявшись, она поправляет растрепавшиеся волосы.{/n} "Их ждет крупное разочарование. Мы найдем способ сбежать отсюда".

traits.locale_text: {n}Jae's ringing laugh makes the rest of the retinue start.{/n} "These foreigners are proper ashmags, aren't they! So this is how they punish those who stick their noses where they do not belong." {n}Having laughed herself out, she smooths her dishevelled hair.{/n} "A great disappointment awaits them. We shall find a way to escape this place."

{n}Jae's ringing laugh startles the rest of the retinue.{/n} "These xenos are right ashmags, aren't they! So, this is how they punish those who stick their noses where they do not belong." {n}Once she is done laughing, she brushes her dishevelled hair.{/n} "They are in for a great disappointment. We will find a way to escape this place."

{n}Jae's ringing laughter makes the rest of your retinue flinch. The very concept of fun seems strangely foreign to you after what you have endured.{/n} "Ha ha ha! What scoundrels those xenos are! So this is how they punish anyone who pokes their nose where it doesn't belong." {n}Having laughed her fill, she fixes her dishevelled hair.{/n} "Those ashmags are in for a serious disappointment. We'll find a way out of here."

{n}Jae's ringing laugh makes the rest of the retinue start.{/n} "These foreigners are proper ashmags, aren't they! So this is how they punish those who stick their noses where they do not belong." {n}Having laughed herself out, she smooths her dishevelled hair.{/n} "A great disappointment awaits them. We shall find a way to escape this place."

So, this is how they punish those who stick their noses where they do not belong." {n}Once she is done laughing, she brushes her dishevelled hair.{/n} "They are in for a great disappointment. We will find a way to escape this place."

{n}Jae's ringing laugh startles the rest of the retinue.{/n} "These xenos are right ashmags, aren't they? So, this is how they punish those who stick their noses where they don't belong!" {n}Once she is done laughing, she brushes her dishevelled hair.{/n} "They are in for a great disappointment. We will find a way to escape this place."

languages.text: {n}婕伊银铃般的笑声惊动了随从众人。{/n}“这群异形可真是一群坏种！原来他们会用这种手段收拾爱多管闲事的人。”{n}笑够之后，她理了理凌乱的头发。{/n}“不过他们可得大失所望了。我们肯定能找到出去的办法。”
languages.original_text: {n}Jae's ringing laugh startles the rest of the retinue.{/n} "These xenos are right ashmags, aren't they! So, this is how they punish those who stick their noses where they do not belong." {n}Once she is done laughing, she brushes her dishevelled hair.{/n} "They are in for a great disappointment. We will find a way to escape this place."

traits.locale_text: {n}婕伊银铃般的笑声惊动了随从众人。{/n}“这群异形可真是一群坏种！原来他们会用这种手段收拾爱多管闲事的人。”{n}笑够之后，她理了理凌乱的头发。{/n}“不过他们可得大失所望了。我们肯定能找到出去的办法。”

languages.text: {n}Le rire de Jae résonne subitement et fait sursauter le reste de votre entourage.{/n} « Sacrés ashmags, ces xénos ! C'est donc ainsi qu'ils punissent ceux qui ont le malheur de fourrer leur nez dans les affaires des autres. » {n}Lorsqu'elle cesse de rire, elle passe une main dans sa chevelure hirsute.{/n} « Ils vont être salement déçus. Nous allons trouver un moyen de nous échapper. »
languages.original_text: {n}Jae's ringing laugh startles the rest of the retinue.{/n} "These xenos are right ashmags, aren't they! So, this is how they punish those who stick their noses where they do not belong." {n}Once she is done laughing, she brushes her dishevelled hair.{/n} "They are in for a great disappointment. We will find a way to escape this place."

traits.locale_text: {n}Le rire de Jae résonne subitement et fait sursauter le reste de votre entourage.{/n} « Sacrés ashmags, ces xénos ! C'est donc ainsi qu'ils punissent ceux qui ont le malheur de fourrer leur nez dans les affaires des autres. » {n}Lorsqu'elle cesse de rire, elle passe une main dans sa chevelure hirsute.{/n} « Ils vont être salement déçus. Nous allons trouver un moyen de nous échapper. »

languages.text: {n}Jae'ın çınlayan kahkahası, maiyetin kalanını irkiltiyor.{/n} "Bu zenolar tam bir pislik çıktı! Demek burunlarını sokmamaları gereken yerlere sokanları böyle cezalandırıyorlar." {n}Gülmesi bitince dağılmış saçlarını düzeltiyor.{/n} "Büyük bir hayal kırıklığına uğrayacaklar. Buradan kaçmanın bir yolunu bulacağız."
languages.original_text: {n}Jae's ringing laugh startles the rest of the retinue.{/n} "These xenos are right ashmags, aren't they! So, this is how they punish those who stick their noses where they do not belong." {n}Once she is done laughing, she brushes her dishevelled hair.{/n} "They are in for a great disappointment. We will find a way to escape this place."

traits.locale_text: {n}Jae'ın çınlayan kahkahası, maiyetin kalanını irkiltiyor.{/n} "Bu zenolar tam bir pislik çıktı! Demek burunlarını sokmamaları gereken yerlere sokanları böyle cezalandırıyorlar." {n}Gülmesi bitince dağılmış saçlarını düzeltiyor.{/n} "Büyük bir hayal kırıklığına uğrayacaklar. Buradan kaçmanın bir yolunu bulacağız."

languages.text: {n}La sonora risa de Jae sorprende al resto de su séquito.{/n} «¡Menudos ashmags están hechos estos xenos! ¿Este es su castigo para quienes se meten donde no les llaman?». {n}Una vez termina de reír, se alisa el pelo desaliñado.{/n} «Se van a llevar un buen chasco, porque encontraremos la forma de salir de aquí».
languages.original_text: {n}Jae's ringing laugh startles the rest of the retinue.{/n} "These xenos are right ashmags, aren't they! So, this is how they punish those who stick their noses where they do not belong." {n}Once she is done laughing, she brushes her dishevelled hair.{/n} "They are in for a great disappointment. We will find a way to escape this place."

traits.locale_text: {n}La sonora risa de Jae sorprende al resto de su séquito.{/n} «¡Menudos ashmags están hechos estos xenos! ¿Este es su castigo para quienes se meten donde no les llaman?». {n}Una vez termina de reír, se alisa el pelo desaliñado.{/n} «Se van a llevar un buen chasco, porque encontraremos la forma de salir de aquí».

languages.text: {n}Jaes schallendes Lachen lässt den Rest des Gefolges zusammenfahren.{/n} "Diese Xenos sind richtige Ashmags, oder? So bestrafen sie Leute, die sich in Dinge einmischen, die sie nichts angehen." {n}Schließlich hört sie auf zu lachen und bürstet sich ihr zerzaustes Haar.{/n} "Sie sollten sich auf eine ziemliche Enttäuschung einstellen. Wir werden einen Weg finden, von hier zu entkommen."
languages.original_text: {n}Jae's ringing laugh startles the rest of the retinue.{/n} "These xenos are right ashmags, aren't they! So, this is how they punish those who stick their noses where they do not belong." {n}Once she is done laughing, she brushes her dishevelled hair.{/n} "They are in for a great disappointment. We will find a way to escape this place."

traits.locale_text: {n}Jaes schallendes Lachen lässt den Rest des Gefolges zusammenfahren.{/n} "Diese Xenos sind richtige Ashmags, oder? So bestrafen sie Leute, die sich in Dinge einmischen, die sie nichts angehen." {n}Schließlich hört sie auf zu lachen und bürstet sich ihr zerzaustes Haar.{/n} "Sie sollten sich auf eine ziemliche Enttäuschung einstellen. Wir werden einen Weg finden, von hier zu entkommen."

languages.text: {n}ジェイの笑い声に、側近の残りの者たちは驚いた。{/n} 「この異種族は本当に酷い奴らだな！ 自分のことではないところへ鼻を突っ込んだ奴らを、こうやって罰するのか。」 {n}ジェイが笑い終わると、乱れた髪をなでた。{/n} 「彼らは大いに失望するだろう。この場所から脱出する方法を見つけ出す。」
languages.original_text: {n}Jae's ringing laugh startles the rest of the retinue.{/n} "These xenos are right ashmags, aren't they? So, this is how they punish those who stick their noses where they don't belong!" {n}Once she is done laughing, she brushes her dishevelled hair.{/n} "They are in for a great disappointment. We will find a way to escape this place."

traits.locale_text: {n}ジェイの笑い声に、側近の残りの者たちは驚いた。{/n} 「この異種族は本当に酷い奴らだな！ 自分のことではないところへ鼻を突っ込んだ奴らを、こうやって罰するのか。」 {n}ジェイが笑い終わると、乱れた髪をなでた。{/n} 「彼らは大いに失望するだろう。この場所から脱出する方法を見つけ出す。」
